description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a matte black finish and a modular design. It is equipped with a collapsible stock, a detachable box magazine, and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. The rifle has a prominent red dot sight mounted on the top rail, and additional accessory rails are visible along the handguard. A sturdy sling is attached for ease of carrying, and the barrel is standard length with no visible muzzle device. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a robust and functional appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, red dot sight, vertical foregrip, and attached sling, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, red dot sight, vertical foregrip, detachable magazine, and sling.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, red dot sight, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, sight alignment, and the overall symmetry of the rifle.
